title: AEP v1.2 F20 Bug Vaccine Kernel Record
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive. Every detected bug emits a small permanent prevention object that immunizes the future corpus (operator source.md L135-150). Honest framing per sec73.6: F20 ships EXTENDS Hypothesis (Python property-based testing) + OSS-Fuzz (mutation fuzzing philosophy) per operator L17 — cite in lineage_basis. HV1 closure: vaccine_rule_budget_per_corpus HARD-CONSTRAINED to max 50; vaccine_calcification_alert FP_rate_threshold HARD-CONSTRAINED to 0.05; rule_retirement_condition MANDATORY. Composes_with: v1.1 F13 ClaimRuntimeFalsifier (vaccines emit new falsifiers) + v1.1 F16 AttackClass registry (vaccines populate the registry).

bug_name.description: Operator L139 verbatim. Plain-language bug name.

repro_input.description: The minimal input that reproduces the bug (operator L141).

smallest_failing_example.description: Hand-reduced smallest failing example (operator L141; bug ontology field 8).

exact_cause.description: Operator L142 verbatim. The root cause in machine-checkable form.

why_existing_gates_missed_it.description: Operator L143 verbatim. Detection gap analysis. Must name the v1.1 primitive(s) that failed to catch this.

machine_checkable_form.description: Operator L144 verbatim. The new invariant expressed as a machine-checkable claim type (bound to v1.2 invariant_contract.schema.json).

mutation_class.description: Operator L17 verbatim 7-mutation-class enum. F23 inherits this enum.

test_fixture_path.description: Path to the mutation test fixture (e.g., projects/v11-aep/publish-ready/aep/tests/mutations/atk-<bug-name>.aepkg/).

new_validator_rule.description: Operator L145 verbatim. The new validator rule expressed in policy-as-code form (bound to v1.2 policy_rego.schema.json).

new_user_facing_warning.description: Operator L146 verbatim. The civilian-comprehensible warning that surfaces on next packet matching this bug class.

affected_packet_versions.description: Operator L147 verbatim. List of profiles where this bug class can manifest.

criterion.description: Operator L148 verbatim. The condition under which this vaccine retires from active enforcement.

no_match_window_days.description: If kind == no_match_window, retire after this many days without any packet triggering this vaccine. HV1 closure default: 90.

max_active_rules.description: HV1 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. Max simultaneously-active vaccine rules per corpus profile. Operator's calcification trap defused by structural cap.

fp_rate_threshold.description: HV1 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. FP rate threshold (5%) above which vaccine kernel is frozen pending operator review.

current_fp_rate.description: Measured FP rate on the validation packet sample. Recomputed on every vaccine emit.

estimated_proven_packets_wrongly_blocked.description: Adversary attack A1 cheapest disconfirmer. Backfill against existing corpus measures how many already-PROVEN packets would have been wrongly blocked by this vaccine.

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage discipline. F20 ships EXTENDS: Hypothesis (Python property-based testing) + OSS-Fuzz (mutation fuzzing philosophy). Cite verbatim per operator L17.

verifying_grep.description: v1.1 gate 6.5 inheritance. Grep query that verifies the lineage claim against the source corpus.

emit_signature_ed25519.description: Ed25519 signature freezing this vaccine's bytes at emit time. Base64url. Composes with v0.8 F3.

examples.bug_name: Rubric definitional gap on list-valued recall fields

smallest_reproduction.repro_input: VG04 blind-recall on adversary AEP using cue 'premortem weakest-assumption' produced the agent mean 4.00 vs warden mean 3.00 (delta 1.00 exceeds 0.5 inter-rater threshold) on the same 3 attempts.
smallest_reproduction.smallest_failing_example: failure_prevented[] list with 3 items where 2 are load-bearing and 1 is decorative; readers disagree on scoring the decorative item.

examples.exact_cause: Rubric language did not distinguish load-bearing vs decorative list items; readers applied different mental models.
examples.why_existing_gates_missed_it: v1.1 F14 RaterQuorumAttestation enforces independence but not rubric-language-completeness; F19 corpus-coverage-witness measures presence not quality.

new_invariant.machine_checkable_form: every RubricScore record whose evaluated_field is array-typed MUST carry rubric_field_class_per_item[] with values from {load_bearing, decorative, evidence_anchor}

examples.new_validator_rule: policy.deny[reason] { input.rubric_score.evaluated_field == 'array'; not input.rubric_score.rubric_field_class_per_item } if rubric_field_class_per_item missing on array-valued evaluated_field
examples.new_user_facing_warning: This packet's rubric does not separate critical findings from supporting details — reviewers may score it inconsistently.

retirement_condition.criterion: 90 consecutive days without any packet triggering this vaccine
